title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: MCP (Model Context Protocol) enables developers to build interactive UIs that render directly in VS Code chat as sandboxed iframes. An MCP tool returns data and an HTML resource reference, which VS Code fetches and renders; the UI can call back to the server for fresh data. Shopify uses this for checkout flows and Excalidraw for interactive diagrams.
